theme.title: Expanded Past Tenses
theme.description: Practice longer sentences using Spanish past tenses including pretérito perfecto, indefinido, and imperfecto.

lesson.title: Stories and Memories
lesson.instructions: Translate the narrative sentences into Spanish.

exercises.prompt: When I was a child my grandfather often told me stories about his adventures at sea.
exercises.answer: Cuando era niño mi abuelo a menudo me contaba historias sobre sus aventuras en el mar

exercises.prompt: One evening he showed me an old map that he had kept for many years.
exercises.answer: Una noche me mostró un mapa antiguo que había guardado por muchos años
exercises.explanation: Indefinido main action with pluscuamperfecto earlier action.

exercises.prompt: While he was explaining the map I imagined distant islands and hidden treasures.
exercises.answer: Mientras explicaba el mapa imaginaba islas lejanas y tesoros escondidos

exercises.prompt: Later we walked outside and looked at the stars together in silence.
exercises.answer: Más tarde caminamos afuera y miramos las estrellas juntos en silencio

exercises.prompt: I have always remembered that night because it inspired my love of adventure.
exercises.answer: Siempre he recordado esa noche porque inspiró mi amor por la aventura

exercises.prompt: As we were returning to the house a cold wind began to blow from the ocean.
exercises.answer: Mientras regresábamos a la casa un viento frío comenzó a soplar desde el océano

exercises.prompt: By the time we entered the house my grandmother had already prepared dinner.
exercises.answer: Cuando entramos en la casa mi abuela ya había preparado la cena
exercises.explanation: Pluscuamperfecto action completed before another past event.

exercises.prompt: We ate together and listened carefully while my grandfather continued his story.
exercises.answer: Comimos juntos y escuchamos atentamente mientras mi abuelo continuaba su historia
exercises.explanation: Indefinido narrative with imperfect background action.

exercises.prompt: That evening became one of the memories that shaped my childhood.
exercises.answer: Esa noche se convirtió en uno de los recuerdos que formaron mi infancia

exercises.prompt: Years later I returned to that same house and remembered everything.
exercises.answer: Años después regresé a esa misma casa y recordé todo
